title: TransDigm Stock Jumps After Earnings Beat On Air Traffic Recovery
text: TDG stock jumped after TransDigm rounded out defense earnings by beating expectations with its Thursday morning results. The post TransDigm Stock Jumps After Earnings Beat On Air Traffic Recovery appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: TransDigm Group Reports Fiscal 2022 Fourth Quarter And Year-End Results
text: CLEVELAND , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG), a leading global designer, producer and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components, today reported results for the fourth quarter ended September 30, 2022. Fourth quarter highlights include: Net sales of $1,510 million, up 18% from $1,279 million in the prior year's quarter; Income from continuing operations of $266 million, up 27% from $209 million in the prior year's quarter; Earnings per share from continuing operations of $3.98, up 11% from $3.58 in the prior year's quarter; EBITDA As Defined of $752 million, up 18% from $636 million in the prior year's quarter; and Adjusted earnings per share of $5.50, up 29% from $4.25 in the prior year's quarter.

title: Will Recovering Air Travel Aid TransDigm (TDG) in Q4 Earnings?
text: TransDigm's (TDG) Q4 results are likely to reflect growth in air travel demand that is expected to boost its commercial OEM as well as aftermarket revenues
